results.title: Pop movie. Part 1
results.brief_description: A six part series offering an in-depth view of the rock music industry. To those who are fans or aspire to a career in music it is compulsory viewing; and for a more general audience it is an insight into the chaotic world of rock `n’ roll.

results.title: Pop Colorture  Zach Smothers

constellations_other.name: Communicating colour
constellations_other.description: An exploration of colour on-screen inspired by Technicolor supervisor, Natalie Kalmus.

results.description: Colorist Zach Smothers brings 1950s and 60s sitcoms back to life, aiming to “bring colours and film tones into harmony, and create realistic color palettes that match the familiar look of film”.
description_for_label: Colorist Zach Smothers brings 1950s and 60s sitcoms back to life, aiming to “bring colours and film tones into harmony, and create realistic color palettes that match the familiar look of film”.

results.title: Pool of contentment
results.creator_credit: Richard Massingham and Central Office of Information
results.brief_description: Explains how a typing pool operates in a British Government Department; points out common faults on the part of officers giving dictation or sending drafts to bee typed; suggests remedies for these faults, also ways in which typists may attain greater efficiency.

results.title: Ponies
results.creator_credit: Hector Lemieux, Joe Hayward and Moreland-Latchford Productions
results.brief_description: Natural sounds and music combine with the beauty of colour and motion to present the pageantry of the pony world. On hilltops, in streams, in wood and meadow, Welsh ponies are seen and heard in a kaleidoscope of mood and motion. A foal is born. A pony is schooled for the show ring.

results.title: Pompeii and Vesuvius
results.brief_description: Shows an actual eruption of Mt Vesuvius and against this background recalls the destruction of the city of Pompeii in 79 AD. The film depicts present-day life in the ruined city of Pompeii and life in the cities and villages around Naples, including folk dancing in Sorrento.

results.title: Polyurethane progress
results.brief_description: A technical film dealing with research, manufacturing processes and the development of outlets for the rigid and flexible foam plastic industry. Illustrates the advanced scientific methods of production, including the moulding of foam car seats by micro-wave units, and the application of rigid foam to wall and other surfaces for insulation purposes.

results.title: Polychrome phantasy
results.brief_description: In this early film Norman McLaren shot crystal formations through a low-power microscope, using polarized light with the lower part of the picture masked off. The film was then rewound and a scene of dancers was filmed. No dialogue or music.
